Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 
54 
SSA_DIB_AWD_CD 
LABEL: 
SSA Disability Insurance Benefit Award Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the disability insurance benefits (DIB) award code from the Social Security 
Administration (SSA). 
LONG NAME: SSA_DIB_AWD_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
A = Health Insurance/Supplemental Medical Insurance
